Patch Set 2:

ping reviewers

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 2:

(2 comments)

There is an old comment in the fast read part of ll_readpage() about checking the layout version.

Now that we are getting the layout for fast reads, maybe we should also check layout lock and layout version *after* fast reads and fall back to slow reads if the layout has changed?

So, I think this patch is closing a real hole but I think there might still be a further hole. 
 This is something I think Alex was worried about - I have added him to the review.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.
Uploaded patch set 3.

parents.subject: LU-17019 tests: fix 'v' usage in test 185

commit.subject: LU-16926 llite: protect layout change before read IO
commit.message:
LU-16926 llite: protect layout change before read IO

Before read IO happens, we'd make sure layout lock is taken to check
file's kms lest its layout is being changed while lov_attr_get() is
ongoing.
